de: Agreement in the form of an exchange of letters between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the Government of the Republic of Ghana on partial reallocation of project funds  - 15-04-2014 - Abkommen zwischen der Schweiz und der Regierung der Republik Ghana betreffend die Implementierung der Reformen im Elektrizitätssektor und der Erweiterung des Programms
en: Agreement in the form of an exchange of letters between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the Government of the Republic of Ghana on partial reallocation of project funds  - 15-04-2014 - Agreement between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the Government of the Republic of Ghana concerning the Implementation of the Electricity Sector Reform and Extension Program
fr: Agreement in the form of an exchange of letters between the Government of the Swiss Confederation and the Government of the Republic of Ghana on partial reallocation of project funds  - 15-04-2014 - Accord entre la Suisse et le Gouvernement de la République du Ghana concernant la mise en uvre de la réforme du secteur électrique et du Programme d'extension
